name: Family Adventure Weekend
headline: Choose a guided Family Adventure Weekend when you want a more curated camp experience
idealFor: Best for families who want support planning something memorable
description: Family Adventure Weekend is the premium inquiry-first lane for households that want more than a simple booking. It combines experience planning, package guidance, and a calmer decision process.
bullets: A more curated family package with support
Better for visitors who want help choosing the right fit
Creates a higher-touch premium planning path

deliverables.title: Experience planning support
deliverables.description: Help families understand the best setup, timing, and package fit.

deliverables.title: Package recommendations
deliverables.description: Turn a broad idea into a more specific, bookable family experience.

deliverables.title: Smoother coordination
deliverables.description: Reduce friction and uncertainty before the experience is confirmed.

timeline.title: Share the idea
timeline.description: Tell us what kind of family experience you are trying to create.

timeline.title: Refine the package
timeline.description: We shape the best-fit option based on timing, goals, and level of support needed.

timeline.title: Move into confirmation
timeline.description: Once the fit is clear, the next paid step can happen with less uncertainty.

proofPoints.title: Inquiry-first by design
proofPoints.description: This lane is intentionally not forced into a generic checkout flow.

proofPoints.title: Families can ask for help before committing
proofPoints.description: That supports both satisfaction and conversion quality.

sections.title: Done-with-you planning
sections.description: Great for families who want a more guided and personalized experience.

sections.title: Premium positioning
sections.description: A higher-touch lane creates a stronger brand and healthier monetization mix.

sections.title: Confidence before commitment
sections.description: Visitors can clarify what they need before moving into a paid path.

leadForm.heading: Start planning your Family Adventure Weekend
leadForm.intro: Share the kind of experience you want so the planning team can guide you into the right next step.

cta.heading: Use Family Adventure Weekend when a direct purchase feels too narrow for what you want.
cta.body: This route supports a calmer, more curated planning experience.
